sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100483" key="sunefhbeu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεφηβ-εύω</orth>, <sense id="n100483.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">serve as</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔφηβοι</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">together</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.816b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
